Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Browse Topics Search

Intranet start-up

Robert Gebeloff The Record May 2000
Journalism & NewsroomData & Databases

Gebeloff details the value and implementation of a newsroom intranet, highlighting its role in enhancing daily reports by democratizing data access.

Gebeloff details the value and implementation of a newsroom intranet, highlighting its role in enhancing daily reports by democratizing data access. Examples include sourcing demographic facts instantaneously and ensuring consistent availability of database resources across various beats without needing intensive computer skills. An anecdote related a reporter who seamlessly accessed vital stats data to debunk public misinformation amidst local controversies.

By implementing a methodical design plan, efficiency, and reduced network strain, The Record achieved significant gains in newsroom performance.
